subcodes.first_line: The Books have been sent down to establish this Cause; whoso turneth away hath verily disbelieved in God and His Messengers and His Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الکتب لاثبات هذا الامر من اعرض انه کفر بالله و سفرائه و کتبه التی
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @Word of God is its own standard
